what_it_does: This file is a metadata record for a channel attachment: it declares an attachment id, its channel, an attachment_type of board_items, and a target board item URI, plus an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: target uses a board:// URI scheme to identify a board item
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Uses a URI-style identifier for the target board item
concerns: No payload or description of what is being attached
No explanation of why this attachment is linked to the board item
Semantic meaning of board_items is not defined in the file
notes: A bare provenance record linking an attachment id to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
Why is this attachment associated with board item item-2edbcf40?
What does the attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship?
apparent_themes: cross-reference between attachments and board items
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for retrieval or audit.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as the target identifier for a board item.
contribution: It contributes a concrete provenance link between an attachment identifier and a board item in the dragnet-development channel, including a precise creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record named att-79b20a99 in the dragnet-development channel links to board item board://item-2edbcf40 with a 2026-06-24 timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record that an attachment belongs to the board_items category and points to a specific board item.
